results.rendered_html:
udakya (von udaka)
1〉 adj. am Ende eines comp. in Bezug auf den Accent gaṇa vargyādi zu  P. 6,2,131 .
a〉 im Wasser befindlich: taṇḍula  KAUŚ. 22,56 .
— b〉 f. udakyā menstruirend gaṇa daṇḍādi zu  P. 5,1,66  (udakamarhati).  AK. 2,6,1,21 .  H. 535 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 25,11,13 .  M. 4,57 . 208 . 5,85 . 11,173 .  YĀJÑ. 1,168 .
— 2〉 udakya (saṃjñāyām) im gaṇa digādi zu  P. 4,3,54 .

udakya a. [udakamarhati daṃḍā˚ yat]

— kyā A woman in her courses (requiring water for purification).
